title: cynara scolymus f. minor
intro: Cynara scolymus f. minor, also known as the dwarf artichoke or wild artichoke, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of cynarin, a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynara scolymus f. minor include its potential to reduce cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and protect against liver damage. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
